arts.sum: Two days ago, we covered claims from Italy which stated Napoli have agreed a deal with AFC Bournemouth to sign Philip Billing on a loan deal with an option to buy. Gianluca Di Marzio now brings the latest on the midfielder’s exit from the Premier League side in the winter market. arts.ttl: Bournemouth and West Ham in discussions over signing Marseille player
arts.sum: The French media are slowly getting into the swing of things in the January transfer window, and that means multiple Ligue 1 players being linked with moves to multiple Premier League sides. Friday has been a busy day for that, and it’s now the turn of Bournemouth and West Ham United.
